description: Store payment methods for future charges using Braintree Vault

vault_with_transaction.description: Save payment method during a transaction
vault_with_transaction.result: Transaction succeeds → payment method token stored on customer

vault_without_transaction.result: Payment method verified and stored — returns token

use_vaulted_method.description: Charge a saved payment method using its token

client_token_with_customer.description: Generate client token with customerId to show saved methods in Drop-in UI

security: Payment method tokens are NOT sensitive — safe to store in your database
Nonces are single-use — always create a new nonce for each payment
Use verifyCard: true when vaulting to confirm card is valid
Associate vaulted methods with authenticated users only
Provide a UI for customers to manage/delete saved methods
